notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes a large-scale battle scene (黑旗军 vs 白毫军) with multiple combatants. Most events are publicly observable conflicts and deaths visible to all participants. The only potentially hidden element is 方源 hiding his strength, but this is already described as an ordinary visible fact (he chooses to observe without revealing full combat power) rather than a specific secret plan, private knowledge, or future-known information. No source pointer directly supports a specific hidden fact about his motives, plans, or private knowledge that would qualify as a hidden/future-known fact. The seed does not contain any directly supported knowledge gap, secret motive, or future-known information that can be stated as an atomic fact without speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes a battle scene with multiple characters fighting. Most observed actions (fighting, killing, reviving) are combat behaviors where motives are ambiguous - we see what characters do but not why they do it. Fang Yuan hides strength and observes, but his deeper motive is not stated. No character's internal reasoning or goal is directly provided in the seed facts. Only behavior is visible; motive is ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
黑家（黑旗军）在战斗中损失了高层战力朱宰（虽被太白云生复活，但暴露了劣势），高扬与朱宰配合仍处于下风，黑家面临战力不足的压力。方源隐藏实力并最终出手击杀了贝草川（草兵军团首领），但黑家并不知情。黑家作为集体组织在战斗中处于不利地位，有合理的压力轴。
IF export filter quarantined 4 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
